title: Presented Query
description: A query result the agent has presented to the user. Written exclusively by the present_result tool — immutable snapshot.

question.description: The user's original natural-language question. Preserves their own words.

summary.description: Short one-line takeaway the agent surfaced with the result.

sql.description: The SQL that produced the rows shown to the user.

columns.description: Ordered column names from the query result.

rows.description: The row data, stored verbatim so the query can be replayed without hitting the database.

truncated.description: Whether the result hit the row cap at the time of presentation.

vega_spec.description: The Vega-Lite spec used to render the chart, if any.
